description: Liquity V1 is an immutable, governance-free borrowing protocol on Ethereum that issues LUSD stablecoins against ETH collateral at a minimum 110% collateralization ratio. All smart contracts are non-upgradeable with ownership renounced to the zero address, making the protocol fully autonomous. The system relies on Chainlink and Tellor as dual oracle sources for ETH/USD pricing, with an automatic fallback mechanism between the two. The protocol holds {{totalProtocolCapital}} in total value across its contracts.

eth:0x5f4ec3df9cbd43714fe2740f5e3616155c.name: Chainlink ETH/USD Price Feed
eth:0x5f4ec3df9cbd43714fe2740f5e3616155c.description: Primary oracle for ETH/USD pricing, used by PriceFeed.fetchPrice to determine collateral values for borrowing, liquidation, and redemption. Owned by a Chainlink 4/9 multisig. If the Chainlink feed fails or is frozen, the system automatically falls back to Tellor.

eth:0x3d7ae7e594f2f2091ad8798313450130d0.name: Chainlink LUSD/USD Price Feed
eth:0x3d7ae7e594f2f2091ad8798313450130d0.description: Oracle for LUSD/USD pricing, used to monitor the LUSD peg. Owned by the same Chainlink 4/9 multisig.

eth:0xad430500ecda11e38c9bcb08a702274b94.name: Tellor Price Feed
eth:0xad430500ecda11e38c9bcb08a702274b94.description: Secondary oracle for ETH/USD pricing, serving as fallback when the Chainlink feed is unavailable or reports stale data. Used by PriceFeed.fetchPrice as part of the dual-oracle redundancy mechanism.

eth:0xdf9eb223bafbe5c5271415c75aecd68c21.name: ActivePool (ETH)
eth:0xdf9eb223bafbe5c5271415c75aecd68c21.description: Holds {{activePoolBalance}} in ETH collateral deposited by borrowers with active troves. This is the primary collateral pool backing all outstanding LUSD debt.

eth:0x66017d22b0f8556afdd19fc67041899eb6.name: StabilityPool (LUSD + ETH)
eth:0x66017d22b0f8556afdd19fc67041899eb6.description: Holds {{stabilityPoolBalance}} in LUSD deposits from stability providers and ETH gains from liquidations. Stability depositors absorb liquidated debt in exchange for discounted ETH collateral.

eth:0x3d32e8b97ed5881324241cf03b2da5e2eb.name: CollSurplusPool (ETH)
eth:0x3d32e8b97ed5881324241cf03b2da5e2eb.description: Holds {{collSurplusPoolBalance}} in excess ETH collateral from liquidated troves that exceeded the 110% ratio at liquidation time. Borrowers can claim their surplus collateral from this pool.

eth:0x9555b042f969e561855e5f28cb12308191.name: GasPool (LUSD)
eth:0x9555b042f969e561855e5f28cb12308191.description: Holds {{gasPoolBalance}} in LUSD reserved as gas compensation for liquidators. Each trove deposits 200 LUSD into the GasPool at opening, which is returned or used to compensate the liquidator upon closure.

eth:0x6dea81c8171d0ba574754ef6f8b412f2ed.name: LQTY Token
eth:0x6dea81c8171d0ba574754ef6f8b412f2ed.description: Liquity governance token with a market cap of {{lqtyMarketCap}}. Used for staking in LQTYStaking to earn borrowing and redemption fee revenue. The token contract includes a one-year lockup mechanism and a multisig-controlled sendToLQTYStaking function, though the token itself is non-upgradeable.

eth:0x5f98805a4e8be255a32880fdec7f6728c6.name: LUSD Stablecoin Token
eth:0x5f98805a4e8be255a32880fdec7f6728c6.description: USD-pegged stablecoin with a market cap of {{lusdMarketCap}}. Minting and burning are restricted to BorrowerOperations, TroveManager, and StabilityPool contracts. The token is non-upgradeable and has no admin mint function.

codeAndAudits.title: Code & Audits
codeAndAudits.description: Smart contract analysis and audit history
